name: Narragansett Bancorp, Inc.
business: BayCoast Bank is a Massachusetts-chartered savings bank that provides traditional banking services (deposits and loans) and operates non-interest income businesses including mortgage lending, wealth management, insurance, and manufactured home financing, serving individuals and businesses in the South Coast of Massachusetts and Rhode Island.
sellsTo: Communities in South Coast Massachusetts and Rhode Island

exposures.sentence: BayCoast Insurance, LLC (BayCoast Insurance), an indirect subsidiary of BayCoast Bank, which provides insurance products to consumers and businesses.
Stack Ally, LLC (Stack Ally), which has been established to provide data integration and automation solutions to organizations.
